objective: Organic mechanics-breakdown Reel built around a different observation than the flagship/paid set (glove-side elbow timing, not foot-strike rotation) so it reads as new content, not a repeat.
audience: Competitive travel-ball and high-school pitchers (14-18) and their parents who follow mechanics-focused content.
hook: This delivery has one hidden inefficiency.
coreInsight: The glove-side elbow dropping early during arm swing pulls the front shoulder open before the front foot lands, which a tall-and-tight glove drill directly addresses.
openLoop: "One hidden inefficiency" promises a specific, findable flaw — the viewer watches to see what it is.
payoff: The freeze frame and overlay name the exact moment and joint; a second rep confirms it, then the drill and product priority resolve it.

scenes.cameraDirection: Real full-speed side-view pitch, hard cut in, no logo, no intro.
onScreenText: THIS DELIVERY HAS ONE HIDDEN INEFFICIENCY
scenes.soundDesign: Single low tick on the cut in.

assetReferences.description: Full-speed side-view pitch, subject B, rep 1

scenes.cameraDirection: Same rep continues, eases into slow motion approaching leg lift/arm swing.
scenes.voiceOver: At full speed you'd never catch it.

scenes.cameraDirection: Freeze frame at peak arm swing; blue overlay animates onto the glove-side elbow and front shoulder line.
scenes.voiceOver: Right here — the glove-side elbow drops early and pulls the front shoulder open before the foot even lands.
scenes.soundDesign: Freeze-frame stop accent; overlay draw-on sound, subtle.

assetReferences.description: Blue overlay on glove-side elbow/front-shoulder line
assetReferences.notes: Motion-graphic overlay only — pitcher footage underneath is real.

scenes.cameraDirection: Split screen: rep 1 freeze frame (left) and rep 2 freeze frame (right), same phase, same overlay.

assetReferences.description: Full-speed + slow-motion side-view pitch, subject B, rep 2

scenes.cameraDirection: Cut to real drill footage: tall-and-tight glove-side drill, one rep.
scenes.voiceOver: One drill keeps that arm connected longer — more direction, less spin-out.
scenes.soundDesign: Music bed enters, low under VO.

scenes.cameraDirection: Screen recording: report scrolling to the flagged priority card and matching drill.
scenes.voiceOver: Pitch Nav catches this from one upload.

scenes.cameraDirection: Static end card: wordmark small at top, CTA centered.

voiceOverScript: At full speed you'd never catch it. Right here — the glove-side elbow drops early and pulls the front shoulder open before the foot even lands. Same pitch. Same pattern. One drill keeps that arm connected longer — more direction, less spin-out. Pitch Nav catches this from one upload. Start your Pitch Nav analysis.
onScreenText: THIS DELIVERY HAS ONE HIDDEN INEFFICIENCY
bRollInstructions: Two reps from the same athlete, matched to peak arm swing. One real drill rep. Real screen recording, no mockups.
editingNotes: Follows content/video-templates/timelines/20s.md exactly. Frame changes every 1-3 seconds. No price card — this is an organic awareness Reel, not a conversion-priced ad.
soundDesign: Low-key analytical music bed, ducked under VO, tension builds through the split screen then eases at the drill beat. One whoosh, one freeze-stop accent, one wipe, sparing UI taps.

assetReferences.description: Subject B, two reps, full-speed + slow-motion, side view
Tense, analytical low synth pulse building to a confident resolve
